BeforeAgent.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" resume || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
BeforeAgent.description: Restore session snapshot, load project memory and evolved skills

AfterAgent.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" reflect || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
AfterAgent.description: Analyze session observations, evolve skills, gate improvements, save metrics

BeforeModel.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" guard || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
BeforeModel.description: Scan prompt context for dangerous shell patterns and blocked commands (best-effort, no PreToolUse equivalent in Gemini CLI)

AfterModel.command: EH=$(command -v epic-harness 2>/dev/null); test -n "$EH" && "$EH" observe || echo '[harness] epic-harness not found'
AfterModel.description: Record multi-dimensional tool usage scores (tool_success, output_quality, execution_cost) into .harness/obs/
